segments.text: Answer me when I call to you, my righteous God. Give me relief from my distress; have mercy on me and hear my prayer.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How long will you people turn my glory into shame? How long will you love delusions and seek false gods?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Know that the Lord has set apart his faithful servant for himself; the Lord hears when I call to him.
Tremble and do not sin; when you are on your beds, search your hearts and be silent.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Offer the sacrifices of the righteous and trust in the Lord.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Let the light of your face shine on us.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Fill my heart with joy when their grain and new wine abound.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: In peace I will lie down and sleep, for you alone, Lord, make me dwell in safety.
segments.speaker: David
